languages.text: Даже в нынешнем состоянии зверь похож скорее на хищную тварь, нежели на верного скакуна.
Even in its current state, the beast looks more like a predatory beast than a faithful steed.
languages.original_text: Даже в нынешнем состоянии зверь похож скорее на хищную тварь, нежели на верного скакуна.

traits.locale_text: Even in its current state, the beast looks more like a predatory beast than a faithful steed.
Even in its current state, the beast looks more like a predatory beast than a faithful steed.
Even in its current state, the beast looks more like a predatory beast than a faithful steed.

languages.text: 即便在如此境况下，这头野兽看上去依旧更像凶残的掠食者，而非忠心的坐骑。
languages.original_text: Even in its current state, the beast looks more like a predatory beast than a faithful steed.

traits.locale_text: 即便在如此境况下，这头野兽看上去依旧更像凶残的掠食者，而非忠心的坐骑。

languages.text: Incluso en su actual estado, esta bestia más parece un depredador que un fiel corcel.
languages.original_text: Even in its current state, the beast looks more like a predatory beast than a faithful steed.

traits.locale_text: Incluso en su actual estado, esta bestia más parece un depredador que un fiel corcel.

languages.text: Même dans son état actuel, la bête ressemble davantage à un prédateur qu'à un fidèle destrier.
languages.original_text: Even in its current state, the beast looks more like a predatory beast than a faithful steed.

traits.locale_text: Même dans son état actuel, la bête ressemble davantage à un prédateur qu'à un fidèle destrier.

languages.text: Şu anki hâlinde bile yaratık, sadık bir binekten ziyade yırtıcı bir canavara benziyor.
languages.original_text: Even in its current state, the beast looks more like a predatory beast than a faithful steed.

traits.locale_text: Şu anki hâlinde bile yaratık, sadık bir binekten ziyade yırtıcı bir canavara benziyor.

languages.text: Selbst in ihrem derzeitigen Zustand gleicht die Bestie eher einem Raubtier als einem verlässlichen Ross.
languages.original_text: Even in its current state, the beast looks more like a predatory beast than a faithful steed.

traits.locale_text: Selbst in ihrem derzeitigen Zustand gleicht die Bestie eher einem Raubtier als einem verlässlichen Ross.

languages.text: 現在の姿でも、忠実な馬というよりは、捕食者としての姿が際立っている。
languages.original_text: Even in its current state, the beast looks more like a predatory beast than a faithful steed.

traits.locale_text: 現在の姿でも、忠実な馬というよりは、捕食者としての姿が際立っている。
